title: Required Subitems on Forms
excerpt: First off THANK YOU for implementing subitem creation through your forms. My team has been using several different softwares to solve for that issue in the past and now that we can do that in house it’s simplifies our wo…

posts.author: Greyes (Gabe)
posts.cookedHtml:
First off THANK YOU for implementing subitem creation through your forms. My team has been using several different softwares to solve for that issue in the past and now that we can do that in house it’s simplifies our workflows so much!

My suggestion to make this even more useful, is just simply to have the ability to make subitems a required. In the form you can designate the question itself as “required” but then form users could essentially just leave most of the subitems blank and still submit the form.

For our use case, and I would assume most others using this feature, it would make our process so much more efficient if we could make the subitems required so we are getting all the information we need upon the first form submittal. Each year we have about 300-500 forms submitted and when any of the subitems are missing it requires customer outreach which doesn’t only slow us down, but also causes frustrations from our customers.

Thanks for you consideration, you guys are doing awesome. And it can’t be overstated enough how thankful I am for subitems being included in forms now.
